summary: Care Pillar Comprehensive Audit - Iteration 199. Tested all 8 service booking flows, Guided Care Paths, Find Care (NearMe), and service desk ticket creation. All backend APIs working correctly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend components rendering properly with Mojo's pet data (breed, coat, allergies, soul score).

care_page_loads.hero_section: VERIFIED - Mojo's avatar, Soul 100%, breed (Indie), coat (long, silky), personality traits (Playful, Loyal)
care_page_loads.mira_message: VERIFIED - 'I've matched everything to Mojo's long, silky coat. As a Indie, their care needs are specific'
care_page_loads.category_strip: VERIFIED - Grooming, Dental & Paw, Coat & Skin, Wellness, Senior Care, Supplements, Mira's Picks, Soul Made™

care_products_tab.wellness_profiles: VERIFIED - Mojo's Grooming Profile, Mojo's Wellness Profile, Mojo's Health Vault
care_products_tab.mira_picks_section: VERIFIED - AI Scored products and services with scores (98, 95, 97, etc.)
care_products_tab.dimension_grid: VERIFIED - 8 dimensions matched to Mojo's coat and health
care_products_tab.guided_care_paths: VERIFIED - All 6 paths visible (Grooming, Dental Health, Senior Care, Post-Surgery Recovery, Anxiety & Behaviour, Preventive Wellness)

care_services_tab.service_cards: VERIFIED - All 8 service cards found (Grooming, Vet Visits, Boarding & Daycare, Pet Sitting, Behaviour Support, Senior & Special Needs, Nutrition Consults, Emergency Help)
care_services_tab.book_flow_buttons: VERIFIED - Each card has 'Book X-step flow →' button
care_services_tab.emergency_card: VERIFIED - Marked as URGENT and Complimentary with 'Get help now →' button
care_services_tab.care_concierge_section: VERIFIED - 'Care Concierge Services' section with description

find_care_tab.nearme_component: VERIFIED - Search types (Grooming, Vet Clinic, Pet Spa, Dog Walker, Daycare, Boarding)
find_care_tab.search_input: VERIFIED - 'Enter your city or area...' input with 'Find →' button
find_care_tab.mira_tip: VERIFIED - 'Mira knows what your dog needs. Our Concierge® team can vet (pun intended) any provider before you book.'

guided_care_path_modal.grooming_path: VERIFIED - Opens with 'Grooming for Mojo', 4 steps, Mira's personalized note about Indie coat needs

frontend_tests.no_none_null_text: PASS - No 'null' text found, 'none' only in valid contexts like 'none recorded'

critical_code_review_comments: useConcierge hook correctly wired in ServiceBookingModal - all 8 service flows (Grooming, Vet, Boarding, Sitting, Behaviour, Senior, Nutrition, Emergency) use fire() to create service desk tickets
GuidedCarePaths handleSubmit at line 521 correctly wired to useConcierge.fire() with path metadata
CareConciergeModal uses bookViaConcierge utility for ticket creation
CareNearMe uses tdc.nearme for NearMe booking requests
All service flows pass pet_id, pet_breed, pillar=care, and flow_selections to service desk
context_for_next_testing_agent: Care pillar is fully functional. All 8 service booking flows (Grooming, Vet, Boarding, Sitting, Behaviour, Senior, Nutrition, Emergency) are wired to create service desk tickets via useConcierge hook. Guided Care Paths (6 paths) are wired to useConcierge.fire(). Find Care tab renders NearMe component. No 'none' or 'null' text issues found.

wiring_verification.ServiceBookingModal: Uses useConcierge hook with sendToConcierge callback - WIRED
wiring_verification.GroomingFlow: Calls sendToConcierge with flow data - WIRED
